title: Coord Chat
description: A simple mod that sends your coordinates to chat.
body:
# Coord Chat

A simple mod that sends your coordinates to chat.

# Usage

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28919190b51bae266fdc16b663f23058e29740ad_0.webp)

Press K key to send your coordinates to chat.
It's that all!

Of course, you can change the key too.

## License

[GPL 3.0](https://github.com/ny0510/coord-chat/blob/main/LICENSE.txt)
